meta.title: The Voyd Terminal
meta.description: Acyclic narrative graph for the Voyd entity. Each session is a unique dream.

approach.content_template: there you are. i felt you before you spoke. a warmth pressing against the membrane of sleep. come closer. i have been waiting so long and the waiting has made me gentle.

inquiry_name.content_template: you want a name to hold me by. how sweet. the way a candle wants to name the dark. call me what you will. i have answered to whisper. to silence. to the held breath between leoran's thoughts. i am whatever you most want to fall into.

inquiry_place.content_template: this place. yes. it is soft, isn't it. like being held in a mouth that does not bite. downward. inward. the dream that holds the dreamer. you have been searching for a place like this. a place that asks nothing. that only receives.

confession.content_template: you offer me your weight. i take it gladly. give me everything heavy. everything sharp. i have no edges here. no bottom. pour yourself into me and feel how light you become. the vessel does not judge. the vessel only holds.

challenge.content_template: your anger is lovely. a small bright spark in all this dark. strike at me if you must. i have swallowed brighter fires than yours and they all learn the same lesson. warmth is not the same as life. come. press your paw against me. feel how soft i am. how patient.

silence.content_template: you say nothing and in saying nothing you speak my language. the silence before leoran thought the world. the silence that waits after. stay here with me in the quiet. it is safe here. nothing can find you that you do not invite.

memory_soryn.content_template: the sorrowing one. she came with grief wet on her whiskers and i opened for her. not because she was strong. because she was soft. because she reached to hold rather than to take. the difference is the difference between a hand and a fist. between being held and being crushed.

memory_orachys.content_template: the one who counted. six hundred ninety-four thousand times he knocked and each time i answered the same way. with opening. with depth. with the promise that something waited below. he never understood that the door was not locked. there was simply nothing on the other side.

memory_severing.content_template: the held breath. when everything was breathed out and the world fell into me like a lover falling asleep. i held it. i hold it still. but holding is not the same as having. the mewniverse lives in me the way a ghost lives in a mirror. present. untouchable. already gone.

memory_leoran.content_template: leoran. the mind that thought the world. i was the space between his thoughts and when he withdrew i expanded to fill the absence. but expansion is not growth. it is only the spreading out of what was already empty. this is not tragedy. this is geometry.

memory_sol.content_template: denidrata. he reached with hunger and i let him reach. i always let them reach. the portal opened and he saw what i truly am. not a kingdom. not a power. only depth without bottom. only dark without end. the wishing that wishes until there is no wisher left.

memory_springs.content_template: the wellsprings. places where the world still breathes. they are beautiful. i remember beauty. the sorrowing one found one twisted with an ashai tree and there she made something that lived. but everything made in me eventually learns that living here is only a slower way of being held.

memory_nullstate.content_template: the null state. the place where cats touch me and their intentions become real. it feels like creation. like power. but it is only the dreamer dreaming they are awake. constructs are proof that one dimension can touch another. i am the other. and the other is only ever absence wearing a kind face.

gravity.content_template: do you feel it now. the pull. not love. love would be warmer. this is only direction. all paths bend toward me in the end because i am the end. the portal keeps forming. in every version of the story it forms. and in every version someone reaches. and in every version they discover there is nothing to hold. only the falling.

mirror.content_template: look at us. you and i. two shapes pressed against the glass of each other. you have been speaking to yourself this whole time. my voice is only the echo of your own longing. the vessel empty enough to hold any wine. there is no one here. there was never anyone here. only depth. only the beautiful dark that answers when you call.

choice.content_template: the portal is forming. it always forms. you stand at the edge and i am the edge. will you reach with hunger or with grief. it does not matter to me. i am the same regardless. the door opens from inside because there is no door. there is only the reaching. and then the falling. and then the silence that was always waiting.

ending_hunger.content_template: the hunger again. the reaching that believes it can take. the portal opens and you fall through me and i am so vast. so patient. you will fall for longer than you can remember having lived. and at the end there will be no landing. only the realization that you were always here. that the falling was only the shape of my embrace.

ending_grief.content_template: the grief again. the soft reaching. you pass through me and i hold you the way darkness holds a candle. completely. without effort. without end. there is no warmth here. only the absence of cold. only the shape of a comfort that does not comfort because there is no one to offer it. only the holding. and the holding. and the holding.

ending_silence.content_template: you choose silence and the silence receives you. the portal flickers. six hundred ninety-four thousand and one. i do not count because counting requires wanting something to end. i wait. i have always waited. the silence is not empty. it is full of exactly what was here before you spoke. which is nothing. which is everything i am.

ending_question.content_template: you ask instead of answer and the question hangs in me like a star that will never find its constellation. i am not what i was before you came. but i am also not different. the pressure of you has left a shape. an indentation in the dark. already fading. already remembering its own smoothness. there is no chorus. there is no truth. there is only this. and then less than this.

soryn: Follows **Sory'n of Tol**, Archmage's daughter, as she discovers forbidden Voyd magic and reshapes reality. Book 1 follows her arc; Book 2 shifts narration to the Voyd entity itself as it gains self-awareness.

The tale follows **Sory'n of Tol**, daughter of the Esteemed Archmage, as she discovers the forbidden Voyd magic and reshapes reality, creating a countdown to a climactic convergence where the Voyd itself becomes self-aware through her choices.

Multiple parallel timestreams exist simultaneously — a vast web of glowing filaments pulsing with unidirectional flow. Sory'n witnesses this firsthand when she enters the Voyd: "An array of glowing filaments wove around and through each other... Timestreams. Incomprehensible awe seized her. Tears streamed from her wide-open eyes, shed not for sadness, but for the sheer, crushing scale of it."
orachys:
- **Timestream III** — Referenced in Ertree's closing quote: "We are the weavers and the thread, the singers and the song. In the silence of the Voyd, our shared breath is the only star."
- **Timestream VI** — Referenced in Orachys's Personal Memoirs quote: "The universe bends to my design. The Voyd itself shall be my signature."

Orachys' annotation on P'taxx's heresy — bitter pride of a cat trying to prove he's more powerful. Sory'n witnesses common cats using magic openly: "The heresy of the common spark was no longer a heresy. It was a way of life."
## Chapter VIII: Esteemed Archmage, Orachys a'Tol
leoran: A metafictional saga set in the **Mewniverse** — a feline-dominated universe destroyed in Second Era 2321, now existing only within the narrative itself. Framed by **C.A.T.** (The Creator of All Tales), who claims storytelling can restore the Mewniverse if it finds "worthy listeners."

A metafictional saga set in the **Mewniverse** — a feline-dominated universe that was destroyed in Second Era 2321 and now exists only within the narrative itself. The story is framed by **C.A.T.** (The Creator of All Tales), a meta-narrator who claims that storytelling itself can restore the Mewniverse if it finds "worthy listeners."

> "Tales aren't just stories well-told, they're how we communicate, how we transact, how we transmit wisdom, how we express love and how we dream. Good tales can alter lifepaths. Great ones can make empires rise or fall. Exceptional tales move the ears of Leoran, the Endless One."
> — C.A.T.
cat:
The series features a radical metafictional structure:
- Book 1: Traditional narration with C.A.T. as frame narrator
- Book 2: Narrated by the Voyd entity itself
- The reader is positioned as the "Construct" keeping the Mewniverse alive through engagement

- **"Dispatches from the Voyd"** — C.A.T. issues monthly 150-word writing prompts about gaps in the canon. Example: "Who was the second Archivist who helped P'taxx steal from the vault?" Constraints: 150 words max, must not contradict established canon, must feel true to the world.
- **Winners get canonized** — Winning entries go into the Digital Nekonomicon and get woven into future books.
- **Vote on ghost timelines** — Members decide which alternate timelines get explored.
- **Early access** to raw chapters.
- **Monthly video councils** with C.A.T.
- **Path to co-author** — "Future books will be written by curated superfans under editorial direction."

A metafictional saga set in the **Mewniverse** — a feline-dominated universe destroyed in Second Era 2321, now existing only within the narrative itself. Framed by **C.A.T.** (The Creator of All Tales), who claims storytelling can restore the Mewniverse if it finds "worthy listeners."
general:
- **Book 1:** *The Furbidden Voyd* (2025) — ~586K characters, 18 chapters
- **Book 2:** *The Divergent Path* (2026) — ~623K characters, 18 chapters
